notes: Skirting = external wall interior face + both faces of internal partitions, minus door opening widths. Door gap deductions: ext_doors=0.920 m (DOOR_90×1); int_doors_×2f=8.000 m (DOOR_82×4, DOOR_72×1). Gross=97.2 m → net=88.3 m.

item_name: Door Frame — Total Family lm (all marks combined)
item_display_name: Door Frame — Total Family lm (all marks combined)
quantity_basis: sum((2×height + width) × qty) for each door mark
notes: Total door frame perimeter for all 6 doors. Heights from DXF/schedule. Widths from DXF block names (HIGH). Use for frame section procurement across all door marks.

item_name: Louvre Window Frame — Total Family lm (all marks combined)
quantity_basis: sum((2×height + width) × qty) for each window mark
notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Total louvre window frame perimeter for all 11 windows. WINDOW_LOUVRE_1100 (h=1.203m) and WINDOW_LOUVRE_800 (h=0.623m): MEDIUM (FrameCAD label evidence). WINDOW_LOUVRE_1800 (h=0.750m): LOW (config default — height blocked). Widths from DXF block names. Use for frame section procurement across all window marks.

Fly screen for louvre window WINDOW_LOUVRE_1100 (8 nr). Area: 1.08m × 1.203m = 1.299 m² each. Tropical building — all louvre openings require insect screening. Verify frame dimensions from window schedule.

Fly screen for louvre window WINDOW_LOUVRE_800 (2 nr). Area: 0.80m × 0.623m = 0.498 m² each. Tropical building — all louvre openings require insect screening. Verify frame dimensions from window schedule.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. BLOCKED PENDING WINDOW SCHEDULE: Height not available in DXF for WINDOW_LOUVRE_1800 — using config default 0.750 m. Screen area 1.39 m² is a heuristic estimate. Screen area will change when window schedule is supplied. Tropical building — all louvre openings require insect screening.

quantity_basis: entrance_door_count(1) — widest door mark(s) in pharmacy
notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Door closer inferred for pharmacy entrance doors. Marks: DOOR_90 (1 nr). Verify which doors require closers from door schedule and architect. Commercial pharmacy may require controlled entry.

source_evidence: canonical_geometry/wf_external: gross=92.16 m² net=77.51 m² − openings=14.652 m² → net=77.51 m²
notes: [canonical_geometry] Opening deductions: doors=1.877 m² [DOOR_90×1(0.920×2.040)]; windows=12.775 m² [WINDOW_LOUVRE_1100×8(1.080×1.203), WINDOW_LOUVRE_800×2(0.799×0.623), WINDOW_LOUVRE_1800×1(1.847×0.750 [louvre_fallback])] (louvre_h=0.75 m). Gross=92.16 m² − 14.652 m² = net=77.51 m².

item_name: External Wall Lining — FC Sheet Total Area (1200×2700mm)
quantity_basis: sheet_count(26) × sheet_area(3.24m²) — gross supply incl. waste
notes: Gross external wall FC sheet supply area. Net wall area: 77.51m² × 1.05 waste = 81.39m². Rounded to 26 full sheets × 3.24m² = 84.24m². Use for bulk supply order alongside sheet count.

item_name: External Wall Lining — FC Sheet Screws
External Wall Lining — FC Sheet Adhesive
notes: Construction adhesive (e.g. Bostik or equivalent). 1 tube per ~2.5 m² of FC sheet.

item_name: External Wall Lining — FC Sheet Joiner Strip
notes: 1 vertical joiner strip per 1.2m sheet-width run × 2.4m height on external wall face.

source_evidence: canonical_geometry/wf_internal: gross=141.12 m² net=124.80 m² − int_doors=16.320 m² → net=124.80 m²
notes: [canonical_geometry] Partition door deductions (both faces): 16.320 m² [DOOR_82×4×2f(0.820×2.040), DOOR_72×1×2f(0.720×2.040)]. Gross=141.12 m² − 16.320 m² = net=124.80 m². Doors classified internal by width < 0.85 m threshold. Measured from DXF WALLS layer: 8 internal wall runs.

item_name: Internal Wall Lining — FC Sheet Total Area (1200×2700mm)
quantity_basis: sheet_count(41) × sheet_area(3.24m²) — gross supply incl. waste
notes: Gross internal wall FC sheet supply area (both partition faces). Net area: 124.80m² × 1.05 waste = 131.04m². Rounded to 41 full sheets × 3.24m² = 132.84m². Use for bulk supply order alongside sheet count.

item_name: Internal Wall Lining — FC Sheet Screws
notes: [canonical_geometry] Partition door deductions (both faces): 16.320 m² [DOOR_82×4×2f(0.820×2.040), DOOR_72×1×2f(0.720×2.040)]. Gross=141.12 m² − 16.320 m² = net=124.80 m². Doors classified internal by width < 0.85 m threshold. Measured from DXF WALLS layer: 8 internal wall runs.

item_name: Internal Wall Lining — FC Sheet Adhesive

item_display_name: Internal Lining Accessory | PVC H Joiner
